privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic CRM task using Odoo 17 Community Edition. The task involves linking a contact named Elena Grigoryeva to the company Stratosphere Solutions, updating her job position to VP of Engineering, and setting her mobile number to +1 (555) 010-9988. All test data is generated by setup_task.sh using XML-RPC API calls. The verification is performed by checking the database state after task execution against these four expected values.
